notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez singles on a ground ball to third baseman Jared Triolo. Andrés Giménez to 2nd. Andrés Giménez advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Jared Triolo.

notableEvents.label: Oneil Cruz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Yariel Rodríguez on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lowe strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to second baseman Nick Gonzales to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Daulton Varsho out at 2nd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Giménez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Jesús Sánchez scores. Ernie Clement out at 2nd. Andrés Giménez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Davis Schneider pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Davis Schneider lines out to center fielder Oneil Cruz.
